market_brief.summary_en: Market holds CONSTRUCTIVE regime at 64.6/100 while SPY and QQQ distribution days hit DANGER levels of 7 and 6.

market_brief.watch_points_en: MU reports earnings 2026-06-24 (est. EPS $19.72); TSM trades at $462.12 near 52-week high $465.38
market_brief.watch_points_ko: MU 6월24일 실적 EPS $19.72 예상, TSM $462.12로 52주고점 근접

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSM closed at $462.12 with all EMAs above price and GC confirmed. Stage2 6/7 with RS 100.0 and euphoric sentiment places it in A+ setup near 52-week high. AI demand driving TSMC to new all-time highs with strong momentum and trader celebrations remains the primary catalyst.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSM $462.12에 모든 이평선 상회 및 GC 확인. Stage2 6/7 RS 100.0 euphoric 심리로 A+ 셋업. AI 수요가 신고점 랠리와 모멘텀을 주도하며 트레이더 축하 분위기가 주요 촉매.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: NVDA closed at $210.69 above EMA21 $210.30 and EMA50 $206.76 yet structure shows DOWNTREND. Stage2 7/7 but RS only 63.4 and DOWNTREND structure limit setup to C. Long-term AI infrastructure dominance and networking revenue surge driving bullish chatter despite short-term consolidation.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: NVDA $210.69에 EMA21 $210.30 상회했으나 구조 DOWNTREND. Stage2 7/7이나 RS 63.4로 C 셋업. AI 인프라 지배력과 네트워킹 매출 증가가 단기 조정 속 낙관 심리를 유지.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: DOWNTREND structure with 52-week high $236.20 still 10.8% above
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Retest of EMA21 $210.30 as potential support

symbol_briefs.brief_en: META closed at $577.22 below EMA21 $594.75 and EMA50 $608.98 with Stage2 only 2/7. RS 13.8 and DOWNTREND monthly structure place it in D category. Meta's major 1.6GW AI compute deal with Crusoe dominates discussion as evidence of aggressive infrastructure buildout alongside strong ad business.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: META $577.22에 EMA21 $594.75 하회, Stage2 2/7. RS 13.8과 월봉 DOWNTREND로 D 셋업. 1.6GW AI 컴퓨트 딜이 인프라 확장 증거로 부각되며 광고 사업과 함께 논의 주도.
symbol_briefs.key_risk_en: Further downside toward EMA200 $636.92 unlikely but structure weak
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Volume contraction may precede base building near current levels

symbol_briefs.brief_en: TSLA closed at $400.49 below EMA21 $407.71 with DOWNTREND structure and Stage2 4/7. RS 36.8 and neutral sentiment result in C setup. Polarization persists with bulls citing Q2 analyst upgrades and FSD Spain approval while bears focus on margins and capex.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: TSLA $400.49에 EMA21 $407.71 하회, DOWNTREND 구조 Stage2 4/7. RS 36.8 neutral 심리로 C 셋업. Q2 애널리스트 상향과 FSD 스페인 승인에 강세론, 마진과 capex에 약세론이 양립.

symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: EMA200 $396.78 as last major support line

symbol_briefs.brief_en: PLTR closed at $128.47 below EMA21 $135.73 and EMA50 $139.22 with Stage2 1/7. RS 0.0 and DOWNTREND monthly chart confirm D setup. Vocal bulls see AI agent momentum and growth metrics as reasons to buy the recent dip.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: PLTR $128.47에 EMA21 $135.73 하회, Stage2 1/7. RS 0.0 월봉 DOWNTREND로 D 셋업. AI 에이전트 모멘텀과 성장 지표로 최근 조정 매수 의견이 나오고 있음.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MU closed at $1,133.99 with all EMAs above price, GC confirmed and 52-week high $1,148.93 only 1.3% away. Stage2 7/7 RS 100.0 euphoric sentiment and earnings in 5 days support A+ rating. Aggressive analyst price target upgrades to $1200-$1500 and strong AI/HBM memory demand narrative driving all-time highs into earnings.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MU $1,133.99에 모든 이평선 상회 GC 확인, 52주고점 $1,148.93까지 1.3%. Stage2 7/7 RS 100.0 euphoric, 5일 후 실적으로 A+. $1200-$1500 목표가 상향과 AI/HBM 수요가 신고점 랠리를 주도하며 실적을 앞두고 있음.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Break above $1,148.93 opens path to analyst targets $1200+

symbol_briefs.brief_en: CRWD closed at $684.86 above EMA21 $663.91 and EMA50 $595.05 with GC confirmed. Stage2 7/7 RS 100.0 and optimistic mood deliver A+ setup. Investors highlight CRWD as a strong buy and core growth holding with AI security tailwinds and resilient cybersecurity spending.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: CRWD $684.86에 EMA21 $663.91 상회 GC 확인. Stage2 7/7 RS 100.0 optimistic로 A+ 셋업. AI 보안 수혜와 탄탄한 사이버보안 지출로 핵심 성장주로 평가받고 있음.
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_en: Sustained price above EMA21 $663.91 keeps uptrend intact
symbol_briefs.key_opportunity_ko: EMA21 $663.91 상회 유지 시 상승 추세 지속

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AMZN closed at $244.39 below EMA21 $250.05 yet above EMA200 $234.13 with Stage2 4/7. DISTRIBUTION structure and RS 57.1 result in B setup. Bullish discussion on AI chip sales potential to third parties and AWS growth reacceleration making valuation look attractive.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: AMZN $244.39에 EMA21 $250.05 하회했으나 EMA200 $234.13 상회, Stage2 4/7. DISTRIBUTION 구조 RS 57.1로 B 셋업. AI 칩 제3자 판매 가능성과 AWS 재성장이 밸류에이션을 매력적으로 보이게 함.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: MSFT closed at $379.40 below all major EMAs with Stage2 0/7. RS 18.3 and DOWNTREND monthly chart confirm D setup. Investors express mixed views on AI capex pressure and recent stock pullback versus long-term fundamentals and buy-the-dip opportunities.
symbol_briefs.brief_ko: MSFT $379.40에 모든 주요 이평선 하회, Stage2 0/7. RS 18.3 월봉 DOWNTREND로 D 셋업. AI capex 압력과 최근 조정에 대한 혼재된 시각이 장기 펀더멘털과 매수 기회 의견과 교차.

symbol_briefs.brief_en: AAPL closed at $298.01 just below EMA21 $298.42 yet above EMA50 $290.29 with Stage2 6/7. RS 59.7 and neutral sentiment place it in B category despite GC and UPTREND. Discussion dominated by reports of upcoming product price increases due to surging memory chip costs from AI demand, with mixed views on margin protection vs demand risk.
